#8 JUDGE PRO TEMP, ARNOLD EVJE II; BELDON YEE, CSR; P. LEE CLERK - C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, CASE SETTLED ON RECORD.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANKINS, CLARENCE HANKINS, SALA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2130 HARRISON ST, #3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110, STAYED UNTIL AUG-08-1994, PLT RESERVES RIGHT TO RECOVER DAMAGES. EACH PARTY BEAR OWN COST & FEES.
